coicop.label: Classification of individual consumption by purpose (COICOP)

extension.description: The Harmonised Index of Consumer Prices (HICP) measures price changes of various consumer goods and services over time (inflation). The index measures price changes in relation to a base year. Data are available with 2 decimals for the aggregates and 1 or 2 decimals for countries.
